_comment: Configure which Azure resources to enable logging for. Set 'enabled' to true/false for each category.

builtInPolicies._description: Resources covered by Microsoft's built-in diagnostic settings initiatives

diagnosticSettingsInitiative.description: 69 resource types via Microsoft Audit initiative

communityPolicyInitiative._description: Custom initiative bundling 44 community policies (includes Storage + 39 additional resource types)
communityPolicyInitiative.description: 44 resource types: Storage (Blob, File, Queue, Table, Accounts) + 39 additional types (Firewall, Synapse, AVD, etc.)
communityPolicyInitiative.note: Single initiative assignment instead of individual policies. Activity Log handled separately (subscription-level).

tiers._description: Policy tiers for selective deployment. Set to 'All' to deploy all tiers.

tierDetails.Storage: Blob, File, Queue, Table, Storage Accounts
tierDetails.Security: AKS, Firewall, NSG, Application Gateway, ExpressRoute, VirtualNetwork
tierDetails.Data: CosmosDB, Data Factory, MySQL, PostgreSQL, MariaDB, Synapse, Databricks, etc.
tierDetails.Compute: App Service, Function App, Batch, Machine Learning, Application Insights, etc.
tierDetails.Networking: Load Balancer, Traffic Manager, CDN Endpoint
tierDetails.AVD: Host Pool, Application Group, Workspace, Scaling Plan
tierDetails.Other: Recovery Services, Healthcare APIs, IoT Hub, Cognitive Services, etc.

supplementalPolicies._description: Activity Log policy (subscription-level, cannot be in resource-type initiative)

activityLog.description: Azure Activity Log - Control plane operations (ARM operations, RBAC changes)
activityLog.note: Subscription-level policy, deployed separately from resource-type initiatives

scriptBasedDeployment._description: Resources configured via direct API/script (not policy-based)

entraId.description: Entra ID (Azure AD) - AuditLogs, SignInLogs, ServicePrincipal, ManagedIdentity, RiskyUsers

defenderExport.description: Microsoft Defender for Cloud - Security alerts from enabled Defender plans
defenderExport.note: Only exports alerts from already-enabled Defender plans (does not enable plans)

defenderXDR._description: Microsoft Defender XDR Streaming API - requires portal configuration after Event Hub setup

xdrStreaming.description: Defender XDR Streaming API - Endpoint, Identity, Office 365, Cloud Apps telemetry
xdrStreaming.note: Script creates Event Hub and validates licenses; portal configuration required for streaming

exportTiers._description: Tables are organized by export priority - start with Tier 1, expand based on needs

tier1_essential.description: Always export - high value, foundation for detection

tier3_situational.description: Evaluate based on specific use cases - often high volume

warnings.DeviceImageLoadEvents: CAUTION: ~100+ GB/day per 1K endpoints. Consider filtering in Cribl.
warnings.IdentityQueryEvents: CAUTION: High volume from normal AD operations. Valuable but noisy.

defenderForEndpoint.description: Device telemetry - DeviceEvents, DeviceInfo, DeviceLogonEvents, etc.

defenderForOffice365.description: Email security - EmailEvents, EmailAttachmentInfo, EmailUrlInfo, EmailPostDeliveryEvents

tablesNotSupported._note: These tables are NOT available in the Streaming API
tablesNotSupported.reason: Not yet supported in Streaming API. TVM tables (vulnerability/software inventory) also not available.

eventHubSettings._namespaceMode: Centralized mode uses shared namespace from azure-parameters.json; Multi-Region mode uses dedicated 'cribl-xdr' prefix

notSupported._description: Resources that cannot stream to Event Hub (for reference only)

vnetFlowLogs.description: VNet Flow Logs - Storage Account only, use Cribl Azure Blob source
vnetFlowLogs.alternative: Use Azure/dev/vNetFlowLogDiscovery for Cribl Blob source configuration

nsgFlowLogs.description: NSG Flow Logs - Storage Account only, use Cribl Azure Blob source
nsgFlowLogs.alternative: Use Cribl Azure Blob source with NSG flow log storage account

resourceChangeTracking.description: Azure Resource Graph Change Analysis - Query-based only, no streaming
resourceChangeTracking.alternative: Use scheduled Azure Resource Graph queries for change history

vmGuestLogs.description: VM Guest OS Logs - Requires Azure Monitor Agent + DCR (not policy-based)
vmGuestLogs.alternative: Use DCR-Automation solution in this repository for AMA-based collection
